taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Generative AI, Data Engineering, Software Development, Python, TypeScript
skill_match_scores: Generative AI:1.0, Data Engineering:1.0, Software Development:1.0, Python:1.0, TypeScript:1.0
must_have_quals: Minimum of 3 years of professional software development experience, Strong proficiency in at least one high-level programming language (Python, Typescript, Java, JavaScript/React), a strong background in Typescript is a plus but not required, Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code, Experience with testing frameworks (pytest, unittest), An understanding of containerization and compute optimization, Build and maintain scalable and reliable APIs to expose data and functionalities to other services and applications, Identify and implement performance optimization for existing code and data processing workflows, including leveraging containerization technologies for parallel execution, Contribute to the design and architecture of our data platform and applications, Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and adherence to best practices, Experience with CI/CD pipelines
preferred_quals: Prior experience in Foundry is a big plus but not required, You are passionate about exploring innovative AI and Generative AI technologies, using them to drive impactful solutions within large-scale enterprise environments, You would enjoy working within the financial services or insurance industry and understand the unique data challenges these sectors face
core_responsibilities: Collaborating with stakeholders to identify and deliver innovative data solutions that meet the evolving needs of the business, Building and maintaining GenAI data pipelines across the business, Partnering with data architects and senior engineers to implement best practices, ensuring sustainable and scalable technical designs, Working closely with analytics, application development, and data science teams to foster collaboration and drive innovation, Delivering on-time, high-quality results on fast-paced schedules while maintaining rigorous standards for development and code management
job_summary: AIG is a leading global insurance organization providing a wide range of property casualty insurance and other financial services. As a Full-Stack Software Engineer for GenAI, you will design, develop, and operationalize GenAI data pipelines to enable innovative AI models and analytics, collaborating across teams to drive business insights and value.
